personalInfo.title: Personal details
personalInfo.emailHint: The email address is tied to your account and cannot be changed here.

display.title: Display
display.themeHint: Affects the whole app immediately. Saved on your device.
display.languageHint: Affects the whole app immediately. Saved to your account.

backgroundMatch.title: Match notifications
backgroundMatch.intro: When this is on, we match new job ads against your profile every night. Top matches are emailed to you right away. Strong matches are collected into a summary you receive by email at the chosen rate. Good matches appear in your match list without email. You can turn this off at any time.
backgroundMatch.toggleLabel: Match new job ads for me
backgroundMatch.toggleDescription: Off by default. Turning it on means you consent to us matching new job ads against your profile and sending notifications by email.
backgroundMatch.cadenceLabel: How often to receive the summary
backgroundMatch.cadenceHint: Applies to the email summary of strong matches. Top matches are always emailed right away.
backgroundMatch.cadenceHintDisabled: Turn on match notifications to choose how often the email summary is sent.

errors.saveFailed: The change could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.

privacy.title: Privacy and data
privacy.description: You have the right to export all data we hold about you, and to delete your account entirely.
privacy.exportTitle: The export flow is not enabled yet

logout.title: Log out
logout.description: End this session. You can log in again at any time.

matchPrefs.title: Matching
matchPrefs.intro: Enter the occupations, places and employment types you are looking for. We use it to show how well each job ad matches your profile. All fields are optional.
matchPrefs.degraded: Your matching choices could not be loaded right now. Try reloading the page in a moment.
matchPrefs.saveError: The change could not be saved. Try again.

cascade.heading: Places
cascade.filterHint: Type to narrow the municipality list, or browse by region.
cascade.regionsUnavailable: The regions could not be loaded right now.
cascade.chooseRegion: Choose a region on the left.
cascade.municipalitiesUnavailable: No municipalities could be loaded for this region.

dialog.title: Add to matching
dialog.intro: Search and select occupations, places and employment types. Selected ones appear at the top of each part. Remove them with the cross icon.

occupation.filterHint: Type to narrow the list, or browse by occupational area.
occupation.noMatch: No occupational group matches the filter.
occupation.fieldsUnavailable: The occupational areas could not be loaded right now.
occupation.chooseField: Choose an occupational area on the left.
occupation.noCvBody: Upload a CV and we can suggest occupations based on your experience. You decide which suggestions to include.
occupation.noRole: We could not read an occupation from your CV. You can choose occupations from the list instead.
occupation.unauthorized: You are not logged in. Log in and try again.
occupation.error: Could not read your CV right now. Try again in a moment.
occupation.yearsHint: Roughly how many years you have worked in the occupation. Optional, and it does not affect your match grade.

skill.searchHint: Type at least two characters to search. Choose a skill from the list to add it.
skill.noCv: We could not read your CV right now. You can search and add skills instead.
skill.noSkills: We could not read any skills from your CV. You can search and add them instead.
skill.unauthorized: You are not logged in. Log in and try again.
skill.error: Could not read your CV right now. Try again in a moment.

experience.label: Years of experience
experience.hint: The approximate number of years you have worked in your field. Optional; leave empty if you prefer not to state it.

wizard.introOccupations: Choose the occupations you are looking for. We suggest based on your CV. Change them if they are not right; you decide which ones to include.
wizard.introSkills: Add the skills you have. We suggest based on your CV. You can search and add more, or remove the ones that are not right. You may also state your years of experience.
wizard.introRegions: Choose the regions you want to work in. Leave empty for the whole country.
wizard.introOrter: Choose the regions or municipalities you want to work in. Leave empty for the whole country.
wizard.introEmployment: Choose the employment types you are open to. Most jobs are listed under "Vanlig anställning". Leave empty for all.
wizard.employmentVanligNote: Most jobs are listed under "Vanlig anställning". Add it so you do not miss matches.
wizard.introReview: Review your choices. You can remove something here, or go back to change it.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save your matching preferences.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your network connection.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.suggestFailed: Could not fetch suggestions right now. Try again in a moment.

account.displayNameHint: The name shown in the app and on your applications.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: You can delete your account permanently. The action cannot be undone and logs you out from all devices.

delete.title: Delete account permanently
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all linked data will be deleted. You will be logged out immediately after the deletion is complete.
delete.confirmEmailLabel: Enter your email address to confirm

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your network connection.
errors.emailMismatch: The email address does not match your account.

onboarding.welcomeBody: Set up your matching and we will show jobs and occupations that fit you. It takes a minute, and you can change everything later.
onboarding.uploadIntro: Upload your CV and we will suggest occupations and skills based on it. You decide what to include, and you can skip this.
onboarding.cvReadNote: We have read your CV and suggest occupations and skills based on it. It is not saved automatically; you can save it under CV when you want to keep it. Would you like to set up your matching now?
onboarding.setUpMatchNote: Would you like to set up your matching now? It takes a minute. You can skip and do it later.
